examples: A 6 "long armguard in usually very adequate."
Shun dao has straight blade and hilt, no armguard.
Please comment those who know! Shall I start at the armguard? Use one rope or two?
Although the ball brushed armguard rather than glove on the way to short leg via Hoggard's pad, umpire Dave Orchard gave the Yorkshireman out.
